reviews.text: I always enjoy learning from Tim and the DiviLife team. The DIVI 5 expert course was well organized, systematic, and comprehensive, and it covered all the aspects needed to get up and running with DIVI 5. I had already explored and worked with DIVI 5 prior to the course, but after taking the course, I felt my comprehension of DIVI 5 was greatly improved. I use the course videos as a reference when working on web projects. Highly recommend!
reviews.title: Highly Recommend the DIVI 5 Expert Course

reviews.text: The Divi 5 Expert Course by Tim Strifler (Divi Life) has been extremely helpful to understand the new tool plus all its possibilities, which are a lot! Divi 5 has not only improved incredibly the performance and the capability of the previous version, but it has actually added certain concepts that, used in an appropriate way, will be really useful for making the design way easier in the long term. Tim managed to organize the course in a very logical way, going from general concepts to specific use cases. He has also created his own framework which has shared with the students, and that can be super helpful as the starting point for every website. But the best thing is that we can adapt it to our needs!  As in previous courses (I had already enrolled other Divi Life course in the past), besides going through the different topics, the live classes are also a great opportunity to ask questions live. And of course, since we have access to the general chat, the questions from other students are also really interesting to learn more. All the classes are recorded and shared with everyone, so they can be watched anytime, pausing, reading the transcripts, etc. And besides the course sessions, there are also specific sessions for Q&A, where not only questions about the course are answered, but also about any topic related to web design/marketing/digital business. Tim is really good at jumping from one topic to the other and he won't hesitate to look for an answer and share it later if he cannot do it live. So, I would basically recommend this course 100%. Thanks Tim and the rest of the Divi Life team!!!
reviews.title: The Divi 5 Expert Course by Tim Strifler

reviews.text: As a boutique brand and web design studio owner, I needed to stop guessing my way through Divi and actually build with intention. This course delivered exactly that. Tim breaks down Divi 5's new design system in a way that actually sticks. The modules on presets, flexbox, and CSS grid alone changed how I approach every build. If you're serious about delivering professional results and charging what you're worth, the Divi 5 Expert training will get you there.
reviews.title: I came in knowing Divi but leaving knowing how to truly use it.

reviews.text:
I’ve found Tim Strifler’s Divi 5 Expert course very useful as I transition from Divi 4 to Divi 5. The changes in Divi 5 can feel significant at first, but Tim does a good job explaining not just how things work, but why they changed. His teaching style is clear, practical, and easy to follow without feeling overly technical or rushed.

The course helped shorten the learning curve for me and gave me a much better understanding of the new workflow and features in Divi 5. If you already work with Divi and want a smoother transition to the new version, I think it’s well worth it.

reviews.text:
GREAT DIVI 5 EXPERT COURSE.  Initially, I thought Divi 5 was a simple upgrade to Divi 4. However, the more information became available about Divi 5's capabilities, the more confusing it all became. That's when the Divi 5 Expert Course from Divilife came in handy. The concepts were explained very well in a friendly and natural way, and all questions were answered live. The live sessions consistently provided clear explanations of the important fundamentals and background of the new Divi 5, always in the context of current topics. We learned how effectively the new features of Divi 5 can be used by following certain sequences and completely rethinking how we work with Divi 5.
Divilife explained its own design system, which greatly simplifies and ensures consistency in the design and construction of websites with the new Divi 5. I am very glad I booked the DIVI 5 EXPERT COURSE.

reviews.text:
I’m really glad I took the Divi 5 Expert Course, because the possibilities with Divi 5 feel almost limitless. Without what I learned, the transition from Divi 4 to Divi 5 would have been quite challenging for me. I think I would have felt overwhelmed and probably even started doubting my own abilities.

Tim explained everything in a very clear and understandable way, and I’m excited to start putting it all into practice.

That said, the first website I migrated nearly drove me crazy at times — there were moments when the builder simply wouldn’t accept my input. Thanks to the coaching call at the end of the lessons, where we could ask our questions, it turned out that this particular issue was actually a bug in the current Divi 5 version.

In this phase, you sometimes just need a bit of patience — and the right guidance — to not lose confidence.

Now I’m moving on to my own company website, and I’m really looking forward to the process!

Beatrice
reviews.title: Exactly What I Needed for the Divi 5 Transition

reviews.text: The Divi 5 Expert Course by Tim Strifler is excellent. It covers the rebuild from Divi 4 to Divi 5, explaining the new Divi 5 features and how they relate to the Divi 4 features. The course goes into detail on the new features and how to implement them. Tim builds courses with a big-picture overview blended with a visual implementation. Participants get both the why and how of using individual features. In addition, Tim includes bonus content to simplify implementation. Tim genuinely wants course participants to be successful and goes the "extra mile" to make it happen. I highly recommend this course for anyone using Divi.

reviews.text:
As a Divi user of over five years, the jump to Divi 5 felt overwhelming. I had tried the demo early on, but I quickly got frustrated and found myself dreading the transition. Being one of Tim Strifler’s original students, I knew his Divi 5 course was exactly what I needed to break that procrastination.

Tim does an incredible job of breaking down the new and improved features in a way that actually makes sense coming from Divi 4. There is so much I wouldn't have even discovered—let alone mastered—without this course. While I’m still learning, I am no longer dreading the move; I’m actually excited to build.

The community interaction in DiviLife courses is something I always look forward to. If you’ve been using Divi for years and feel stuck or intimidated by the new version, this course is the best investment you can make for your business.
reviews.title: Bridging the Gap from Divi 4 to Divi 5

reviews.text: I recommend the Divi Live Divi 5 Expert online course for many reasons.  1. As a long time user of Divi 4, we all know Divi 5 is a major upgrade that is completely rebuilt.  As a busy developer with multiple Divi sites, I took this course to save time getting up to speed on migrating and learning about new features and possible pitfalls.  Tim's organized approach to presenting his material that logically builds in the order it is most helpful is very much appreciated.  His attention to answering our specific Questions each class was especially helpful.  And the interaction between participants in the chat added value and the willingness to help other developers solve issues was an unexpected bonus. I plan on going back through the lessons to review the material.  Thanks again, Tim.

topicAiSummaryReviews.text: The Divi 5 Expert course is invaluable! I had installed Divi5 on a new site as soon it was available, dove right in, and chased my tail in circles for a week. I clearly did not understand the new Divi 5 lingo, the relationship between variables, presets, and components, and how to use them in concert to build a site. Each lesson is built on the previously-covered info to develop a practical, hands-on understanding of not only how to use the new Divi, but also apply it in real-world settings to create solid, usable websites. Tim graciously offers tips all along the way to ensure your success with Divi 5, and shares tools that all web designers should have in their toolbox. Tim is generous with his knowledge and willingness to share. And the Divi Life Design Framework brings everything together as a useful foundation for jumpstarting website design. Just a few days after the final lesson, I started a new site with new confidence (and efficiency!), and easily converted a handful of sites to the new Divi. This course is worth every penny and minute spent, and then some.

topicAiSummaryReviews.text: The Divi Life Divi 5 expert course was exactly what I needed to seamlessly move from Divi 4 to the more complicated Divi 5 builder system. The course was structured in a logical and easy-to-understand way, first providing a complete overview of every part of the back end and explaining what was new and what had changed from Divi 4, etc. The course then went on to cover some of the more complex building techniques in great detail. Tim took the time to answer everyone’s question and had a very positive attitude. I’m an older designer and have to constantly learn new technologies to keep current. I usually muddle through random YouTube videos, etc., but was very happy to take this comprehensive course to quickly and efficiently get me up and running as soon as possible. Thanks to the Divi Life team for a great course!

aiSummary.summary:
Evaluating 204 reviews, reviewers overwhelmingly had a great experience with this company. Customers consistently praise the products, highlighting them as excellent, well-coded, and reliable tools that significantly enhance productivity and website functionality. Many people appreciate the clear content presentation, intuitive user experience, and the diverse range of extensions and themes that allow for various creative presentations. The customer service is frequently described as outstanding, with staff being quick to respond, genuinely caring, and providing professional, helpful support.

However, some customers also noted issues with product compatibility, particularly regarding Divi 5, leading to plugins being unusable or not meeting expectations. A few other people also felt that customer support was not always helpful, with slow responses or a lack of clear communication regarding product features or refunds.

topicAiSummaries.summary: Consumers find product to be positive, with many reviewers expressing satisfaction with the quality and usefulness of the courses and plugins, especially the Divi 5 Expert course. Customers consistently praise the products as top-notch, delivering exactly what was expected and even exceeding expectations. However, a few users reported issues with plugin compatibility with Divi 5 and occasional unreliability, leading to the need for support.

Clients share positive opinions on user experience, particularly regarding the helpfulness of courses in navigating complex systems like Divi 5. Many reviewers appreciate the clear, practical, and easy-to-follow teaching styles, which help shorten the learning curve and provide a better understanding of new workflows and features. However, some customers experienced issues with certain plugins, such as Divi Overlays and Divi Shortcode, citing annoying pop-ups and unreliable functionality. Despite these minor drawbacks, many found the courses invaluable for mastering Divi 5 and enhancing their professional work.

People report positive experiences with website, especially regarding courses that simplify design and construction with new versions like Divi 5. Reviewers appreciate how these resources prepare them for future web development and help them understand new building approaches, saving countless hours of work. Many customers also highlight the value of DiviLife's tools, plugins, and themes, which enhance productivity and provide unique enhancements for WordPress and Divi websites. However, some users encountered issues with Divi Overlays' pop-ups and difficulties accessing accounts after purchasing products.

Customers consistently note positive experiences with staff, particularly highlighting the expertise and dedication of a specific team member and their team. Reviewers describe a specific instructor as an excellent, patient, and approachable instructor who is generous with their knowledge and genuinely wants participants to succeed. The support team is also praised for being responsive, helpful, and quick to resolve issues, often going the extra mile. However, one customer mentioned receiving a snotty response when questioning something.

Customers had positive experiences with customer service, often describing it as fast, professional, and helpful. Reviewers appreciate the quick responses, knowledgeable staff, and the effort to resolve issues, with some highlighting specific agents for their excellent support. However, some customers reported difficulties accessing support, long wait times, and issues with priority support not being consistently available or effective.

infoBusinessUnitBox.descriptionText:
Divi Life is a leading provider of premium plugins, child themes, layout packs, and tutorials built specifically for the Divi WordPress Theme by Elegant Themes. 🚀

Since 2016, Divi Life has helped hundreds of thousands of web designers, developers, freelancers, and entrepreneurs build better websites faster, with tools that enhance the power and flexibility of Divi. 💪

Our product lineup includes powerful tools like Divi Overlays, Divi Mega Pro, Divi Bars, Divi Modules Pro, Divi Mobile Menu, Divi Hacks, and more — all deeply integrated with the Divi Builder for a seamless design experience. Every product is lightweight, easy to use, and continuously updated to remain fully compatible with the latest Divi releases, including Divi 5! 🥳

In addition to our plugins, we offer professionally designed child themes and layout packs to help users launch websites quickly with a polished, high-converting design. Whether you’re building your own site or working on client projects, Divi Life helps you save time, reduce friction, and get professional results.

Our All Access Pass is the best way to unlock the full power of Divi Life. It includes every current and future product, plus regular updates and premium support — all at an unbeatable value.

What truly sets Divi Life apart is our commitment to customer success. We’re known for our responsive support, expert tutorials, and strong presence in the Divi community. Whether you're just starting out or scaling a web design business, we’re here to help you thrive with Divi.

translations.about-page/ceo/alt-text: A photograph of Peter Mühlmann – founder and CEO of Trustpilot – sitting in front of a window.
translations.about-page/ceo/quote-V2: “Our vision is to become a universal symbol of trust, empowering consumers to make confident, informed buying decisions while allowing businesses to credibly signal the quality of their services and to gain actionable insights to improve them.”
translations.about-page/ceo/quote-v3: “Our vision is to become the universal symbol of trust, empowering consumers to make confident, informed buying decisions while allowing businesses to credibly signal the quality of their services and to gain actionable insights to improve them.”
translations.about-page/head/metadescription: Hello, we are Trustpilot, Our mission is to bring people and companies together to create ever-improving experiences for everyone. Find out about our company history, products and more.
translations.about-page/head/metadescription-v2: Trustpilot began in 2007 with a simple yet powerful idea that is more relevant today than ever — to be the universal symbol of trust, bringing consumers and businesses together through reviews.
translations.about-page/trustbox/description: We aim to continuously improve, and every review helps us provide better experiences for everyone.
translations.about-page/trustbox/header: See what people are saying about Trustpilot
translations.about-page/trustpilot-description/part-1: Trustpilot was founded in 2007 with a vision to create a universal symbol of trust. We’re an independent, digital platform that brings businesses and consumers together to foster trust and inspire collaboration. We’re free to use, open to everybody, and built on transparency.
Trustpilot began in 2007 with a simple yet powerful idea that is more relevant today than ever — to be the universal symbol of trust, bringing consumers and businesses together through reviews.
translations.about-page/trustpilot-description/part-2: Trustpilot helps consumers shop with confidence and helps businesses build trust, grow and improve what they offer. The more consumers use our platform to share their experiences, the richer the insights we offer businesses, and the more opportunities they have to earn the trust of consumers from all around the world.
Trustpilot is open, independent, and impartial — we help consumers make the right choices and businesses to build trust, grow and improve.
translations.about-page/video/preview/alt-text: A preview of a video introducing Trustpilot.
translations.about-page/what-we-do/circle/label: We bring consumers and businesses together to make things better
translations.about-page/who-we-are/carousel/image/ceo: A photograph of Trustpilot CEO, Peter Holten Mühlmann, engaged in friendly conversation with a Trustpilot employee in Trustpilot's office.
translations.about-page/who-we-are/carousel/image/des: A photograph of two employees engaged in conversation in the midst of desks in Trustpilot's office.
translations.about-page/who-we-are/carousel/image/sun: A photograph of smiling Trustpilot employees collaborating in sunshine.
translations.about-page/who-we-are/description-v3: We have more than 900 employees and we’re headquartered in Copenhagen, with operations in Amsterdam, Denver, Edinburgh, Hamburg, London, Melbourne, Milan and New York.
translations.about-page/who-we-are/description-v4: We have more than [NUMBER] employees and we’re headquartered in Copenhagen, with operations in Amsterdam, Denver, Edinburgh, Hamburg, London, Melbourne, Milan and New York.
translations.about-page/who-we-are/header: We’re a passionate bunch of people from all around the world
translations.accept-terms-page/description: Please accept Trustpilot’s terms & conditions and privacy policy. Once you have accepted them you can use our services.
translations.accept-terms-page/checkbox-label: I accept the new [LINK-TC-BEGIN]Terms & Conditions[LINK-TC-END] and [LINK-PP-BEGIN]Privacy Policy[LINK-PP-END]
translations.accept-terms-page/accept-terms-and-agree: By continuing, you agree to Trustpilot’s [LINK-TERMS-BEGIN]Terms and Conditions[LINK-TERMS-END] and [LINK-PRIVACY-BEGIN]Privacy Policy[LINK-PRIVACY-END].
translations.authentication-modal/header: Log in or sign up on Trustpilot
translations.authentication-modal/force-login/header: Keep browsing with a free account
translations.cookie-consent/ccpa/title-v2: Do not sell or share my personal information
translations.cookie-consent/ccpa/body-1: Under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), you can opt out of Trustpilot selling your personal information to third parties by updating your cookie preferences.
translations.cookie-consent/ccpa/body-1-v2: Under U.S. state privacy laws, you have the right to opt out of Trustpilot sharing your personal information with third parties by updating your cookie preferences.
translations.cookie-consent/ccpa/body-2: Please note that if you opt out, we can’t offer you personalized ads.

translations.user-data-page/intro/body: Personal data is any information that relates to an identifiable individual. Our [LINK-BEGIN]Privacy Policy[LINK-END] explains what personal data we collect from you, and how we collect, use, disclose, transfer, and store it.
translations.user-data-page/reviews/heading: Information about your reviews on Trustpilot
translations.user-data-page/reviews/body: You can see your reviews [LINK-BEGIN-REVIEWS]here[LINK-END-REVIEWS]. You can change or delete your reviews at any time by following [LINK-BEGIN-SUPPORT]these steps[LINK-END-SUPPORT].
translations.user-data-page/location/heading: Information about your device and location
translations.user-data-page/location/body: The IP address you signed up with is: [IP]. To access your location information, go to your [LINK-BEGIN]user profile[LINK-END].
translations.user-data-page/download/body: Download your personal data and any reviews you've written on Trustpilot.
translations.user-data-page/download/body-v2: Download your personal profile information, including any service and product reviews you've written, in a standard file format (JSON):
translations.user-data-page/additional-info/body: We also collect additional analytics information relating to you as you use our services, which can’t be downloaded above. This may include your Trustpilot search history, time spent on our site, features or functions you’ve accessed, links you’ve clicked, and more. To obtain a complete set of all such data, email us at [LINK-BEGIN]privacy@trustpilot.com[LINK-END] with the subject line: “Access Request”.
translations.user-data-page/additional-info/body-v2: We also collect additional data on how you use Trustpilot—which can’t be downloaded above. This could include anything from your Trustpilot search history and time spent on our site, to features or functions you’ve accessed, links you’ve clicked, and more. To access this data, email [LINK-BEGIN]privacy@trustpilot.com[LINK-END] with the subject line ‘[SUBJECT-LINE-BEGIN]Data Subject Access Request[SUBJECT-LINE-END]’, and include a quick explanation of your request in the email body.
translations.user-data-page/additional-info/body-v3: For more information please refer to our Privacy Policy [LINK-BEGIN]here[LINK-END].
